channel.title: KiddieDaily — Technology
channel.description: Tech and innovation news for kids.

item.title: White House upends AI model release
item.description: {beacon} View Online Technology Technology   The Big Story White House halts new AI models, spurring confusion The Trump administration's request for OpenAI to delay the release of its new model

item.title: Anthropic says US lifts export ban on its advanced AI tools
item.description: Fable and Mythos were abruptly suspended in June over concerns that they could be used by hackers.

item.title: The brain’s language network is more extensive than previously thought
item.description: A new study reveals that parts of the brain located far from the canonical language-processing centers are also involved in language comprehension.

item.title: Global firms and German startups compete in realizing nuclear fusion
item.description: Companies around the world are competing to see who can build the first commercially viable nuclear fusion reactor. German startups are also in the race, supported by major corporations and private in

item.title: US lifts restrictions on Anthropic’s powerful AI models Fable and Mythos
item.description: AI firm says it will begin restoring access to Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 after the removal of export controls.

item.title: Pakistan says it intercepted four drones fired from Afghanistan
item.description: Afghan defence ministry says it carried out 'air strikes' in Pakistan's Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa provinces.

item.title: A portable ultrasound system could make reliable breast imaging more accessible
item.description: The new technology, which generates high-resolution, 3D images of breast tissue, requires no expertise to operate and could be used at home.

item.title: How urban design leads to better wellness
item.description: An extensive study of U.S. cities identifies walkable neighborhoods, urban greenery, and access to amenities as key contributors to residents’ health.

item.title: Scientists Discover Quantum Entanglement in a Crystal You Can Hold
item.description: TU Wien has detected strong quantum entanglement for the first time in a centimeter-sized crystal of a strange metal. Many quantum effects are easiest to detect in very small systems, such as individu

item.title: The Orbital Data Center Hype Machine Is Already in Orbit
item.description: “ The lowest-cost place to put AI will be in space, and that will be true within two years, maybe three at the latest,” SpaceX founder Elon Musk told the World Economic Forum in Davos this past Januar

item.title: New NASA space telescope images reveal the universe in stunning red, white and blue for America 250
item.description: NASA's Chandra X-ray Observatory has released four stunning images of cosmic wonders, depicted in red, white and blue for the America 250 anniversary on July 4.

item.title: One of America's oldest manufacturers says AI is creating jobs — not replacing them
item.description: Corning partners with Nvidia to build optical fiber factories in North Carolina and Texas, creating 3,000+ jobs to meet surging AI infrastructure demand.

item.title: Concerns rise over rise of near collisions between planes, drones
item.description: A JetBlue plane and a United plane have had near collisions or near misses with drones in the last couple of days.

item.title: LLMs are stuck in a groupthink rut. This startup is trying to get them out.
item.description: Let’s start with a game. Open up your chatbot of choice—Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini—and type “Give me a random number between 1 and 10.” You’re going to get 7. Almost always. Now type “Another” and you’ll

item.title: This space telescope is falling. A robotic spacecraft may save it
item.description: A private rocket mission aims to boost NASA’s Swift telescope before its orbit decays, extending its hunt for gamma-ray bursts.

item.title: Whom is AI replacing? We deserve to know.
item.description: Firms should be required to publicly disclose which jobs are being eliminated as soon as it happens.

item.title: Securing America's future in the age of AI
item.description: Artificial Intelligence is already improving everyday life and has the potential to further strengthen America, but it must be harnessed to reflect American values of freedom and human rights, and to

item.title: As AI Reshapes Global Energy Systems, Melbourne Leads Through Engineering Collaboration
item.description: This article is brought to you by Melbourne Convention Bureau (MCB) supported by Business Events Australia . As artificial intelligence accelerates global demand for compute, a parallel constraint is

item.title: After Afghanistan fires drones into Pakistan, what’s next?
item.description: Pakistan and Afghanistan have been locked in an on-off cycle of cross-border strikes, leaving their ties in tatters.

item.title: Why Mentorship Is the Most Underrated Leadership Skill
item.description: I started my professional journey as an engineer before moving into product strategy and innovation leadership roles for several global technology organizations. Over the years, I have served as a men
